title: Secret scanner hardening (G3/G5 defect burn-down)
objective: Fix the 7 G3 defects and G5 findings in .github/scripts/secret_scan.py: (1) compound-prefix generic regex (AUTH_TOKEN=, DB_PASSWORD=, allowed_token); (2) inventory-name pattern class scanning for every exact secret name in docs/SECRETS_POLICY.md section 2 with a non-placeholder value; (3) postgres-URI pattern class; (4) exact-path allowlist plus content-scan of .env.example files for non-empty values; (5) pragma with empty justification exits 1; (6) UTF-16 BOM detection so PS 5.1-redirected files are scanned not skipped; (7) sanitize printed paths against workflow-command injection (newlines/control chars); (8) exit-code cleanup (git failure exits 2 not 1) and visible notices for >2MB/binary skips; (9) re-fixture S2 so the inline pragma actually triggers and the visible ALLOWLISTED LINE notice is captured, plus new fixture lines for compound names, hex key, postgres URI, deploy-hook URL, and a UTF-16 file. ADDED from M0-T009 G5 review: (10) delete or scheme-guard the legacy jsonschema RefResolver fallback in .github/scripts/validate_contracts.py:90-99 (attempts requests.get on store miss; PRIORITY RAISED by M0-T009 G4 evidence: the GitHub runner ships jsonschema 4.10.3 < 4.18, so this is the LIVE path in CI, not dead code); (11) shared control-character-stripping print helper applied to BOTH secret_scan.py and validate_contracts.py output paths (M0-T005 G5 F1 + M0-T009 G5 F2, same CI log-injection pattern); optionally add UnicodeDecodeError to validate_contracts.py load_json handlers (M0-T009 G5 F3).
business_reason: G5 passed M0-T005 conditional on this rework landing before the first real credential enters the repo or M0 exit; policy section 1 claims mechanical enforcement that defects D1/D2 currently overstate
inputs: project-control/reports/M0-T005-G3-review.md (defects D1-D7 with file:line and desk-test reproductions)
project-control/reports/M0-T005-G5-security-review.md (severity adjudication, findings F1, follow-up scope list)
docs/SECRETS_POLICY.md section 2 (exact inventory names for the new pattern class)
outputs: docs/SECRETS_POLICY.md (one section-5 sentence: empty pragma justification fails the scan)

acceptance_scenarios.expected: scanner exits 0; existing S1 behavior unchanged (3 allowlist notices now path-exact); runtime still well under 60s

acceptance_scenarios.input: fixture with compound-name assignments (AUTH_TOKEN=, DB_PASSWORD=), a GEOCLIENT hex value, a postgres:// URI with password, a RENDER_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL value, and a UTF-16-encoded file containing a fake rnd_ key
acceptance_scenarios.expected: every planted line detected with correct class and masked value; UTF-16 file scanned, not skipped

acceptance_scenarios.input: line matching generic class with '# secretscan:allow <justification>' pragma, and the same line with empty justification
acceptance_scenarios.expected: justified pragma suppresses WITH visible 'ALLOWLISTED LINE' notice; empty justification exits 1 (finding not suppressed)

acceptance_scenarios.input: a file named .env.example outside the two policy-approved paths containing a real-shaped value; a policy-approved .env.example with a non-empty value
acceptance_scenarios.expected: both flagged as findings (exact-path allowlist + content check), not silently skipped

acceptance_scenarios.input: scanner run outside a git repository; filename containing a newline/control character (desk-test acceptable on Windows)
acceptance_scenarios.expected: git failure exits 2 with a clear message (distinguishable from findings); printed paths are sanitized so no GitHub workflow command (::notice/::add-mask) can be injected

acceptance_scenarios.input: the 9 original pattern classes from M0-T005 S2
acceptance_scenarios.expected: all still detected and masked exactly as in project-control/reports/M0-T005-G2-evidence.md; no workflow file changes; package-lock.json still allowlisted

risks: Inventory-name pattern class must not false-positive on the .env.example templates themselves (names with empty values) or on docs that mention the names without values
Must land before the first real credential enters the repository or M0 exit, per G5 condition
